g.text: Carry the warm trays to the tables.
Join the folding table and pleat {ROUTE_...
Take one tray at a time, slow and steady...
Stack three trays high for one big trip.
Ask the tall noodle cook for a boost.
Wait for the breeze to bring it down.
Bring the rescued papers back to {ROUTE_...
Carry the gold square back to {ROUTE_B_K...
Pass out the little clay cups.
Refill the big kettle from the barrel.
Carry two cups at a time, nice and level...
Load up the whole tray in one go.
Sort the tin of tiny screws by size.
Hunt for the runaway gear under the stal...
Keep lining the screws up in neat rows.
Wind the beetle's key as far as it can g...
Build it the classic way, big ones on th...
Hold the songbook pages against the bree...
Try the little brass bells with the drum...
Ring the bells softly in time.
Give the big gong one mighty whack.
Take a bow with the band.
Help {COMPANION} fold and write her wish...
Lean in so {COMPANION} can whisper her w...
Write {COMPANION}'s wish just as she whi...
Add a second wish for all of {THRESHOLD}...
Hand {COMPANION} the brush to write it h...
Let {COMPANION} light the wick all by he...
Light it together on a count of three.
Ask the oldest keeper to light it the ol...
Bring everyone into a circle around {COM...
Let {COMPANION} lead the count of three.
Hum {GOAL}'s song and let it lift.
